channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
Scaling up Kimi K2.6 with more NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs! Will be adding more in the coming days.
Try ...
item.description:
Scaling up Kimi K2.6 with more NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs! Will be adding more in the coming days.
Try it with OpenClaw: ollama launch openclaw --model kimi-k2.6:cloud
Try it with Hermes Agent: ollama launch hermes --model kimi-k2.6:cloud
Try it with Claude Code: ollama launch claude --model kimi-k2.6:cloud
Chat with the model: ollama run kimi-k2.6:cloud
--- @ollama | ❤️ 9 | 🔁 1 | 💬 0 | 👁 358
item.author: @ollama

item.title:

item.description:
Scotland Taps Ocean Power to Generate #CleanEnergy for 175,000 Homes by @wef

item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title: GPT image 2 最强大的是人物面部特征还原！ 还原程度秒杀Nano banana OpenAI bet的爆发点也是这个 为此他们在GPT上新开了一个Tab叫Images 推荐了各种玩法 我刚刚...
item.description:
GPT image 2 最强大的是人物面部特征还原！ 还原程度秒杀Nano banana OpenAI bet的爆发点也是这个 为此他们在GPT上新开了一个Tab叫Images 推荐了各种玩法 我刚刚试了 What would I look like as a K-Pop Star？ 效果惊艳！
大家快去你的GPT看看你有没有这个新功能吧～ https://t.co/kOdgc7PBCw
--- @stark_nico99 | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 108
item.author: @stark_nico99

item.title: Came for the nap, stayed for the vibe. https://t.co/bMwb1gb7ax
item.author: @binance
